retrieval_text: Blackberry is a medicinal herb profile in the Herbalisti historical corpus. It is represented across 139 works and 252 source-linked chunks. Recorded variants include Blackberry, Blackberries. Common plant-part co-mentions include Root, Bark, Leaf, Berry, Gum, Fruit. Common preparation co-mentions include Syrup, Decoction, Tea, Cordial, Tincture, Juice. Common condition co-mentions include Diarrhoea or looseness, Dysentery, Cold or catarrh, Wounds or ulcers, Cholera, Fever. Caution co-mentions include Dose caution, Child-use caution, Bleeding caution, Narcotic or sedative caution, Toxicity watch, Allergy or sensitivity caution.
